name: Tabcoach
description: Sync open Chrome tabs to a local Tabcoach server.

show-tab-switcher.description: Show tabs in the current window

speak-selection.description: Send selected text to Tabcoach TTS

previous-tab.description: Switch to the previously active tab in the current window

next-tab-in-history.description: Switch forward in the tab activation history

assign-numeric-bookmark-0.description: Assign numeric bookmark 0 to the active tab

assign-numeric-bookmark-1.description: Assign numeric bookmark 1 to the active tab

assign-numeric-bookmark-2.description: Assign numeric bookmark 2 to the active tab

assign-numeric-bookmark-3.description: Assign numeric bookmark 3 to the active tab

assign-numeric-bookmark-4.description: Assign numeric bookmark 4 to the active tab

assign-numeric-bookmark-5.description: Assign numeric bookmark 5 to the active tab

assign-numeric-bookmark-6.description: Assign numeric bookmark 6 to the active tab

assign-numeric-bookmark-7.description: Assign numeric bookmark 7 to the active tab

assign-numeric-bookmark-8.description: Assign numeric bookmark 8 to the active tab

assign-numeric-bookmark-9.description: Assign numeric bookmark 9 to the active tab
